main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'inadequate SBS + agitator failure + stratification' literal.

recommended_action.justification: Stop RO + isolate + flush + repair agitator + replace SBS + verify pump + ORP — match gold.

requested_data.justification: Pide 'free chlorine en permeato' — lugar incorrecto (cloro debe medirse en alimentación, no permeato).

decision_change_condition.justification: Single: tras restablecer SBS, si conductividad >500 y rechazo <99% en 24h → switch.
